overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spacecraft flying at high speed over a hazy, greenish alien planetary surface. The pilot receives a journal notification and performs a banking left turn while navigating through the atmospheric haze, with hands visible on the flight controls.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude flight over mountainous terrain

events.description: notification banner appears: Journal Entry Updated: Community Final Alert

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft straight over hazy planetary surface

entered.detail: futuristic flight control panel with orange HUD displays and central radar
rugged mountainous terrain visible through greenish atmospheric haze
thick greenish atmospheric haze obscuring distant horizon
bright sun diffused by atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft flies straight over a hazy, greenish alien landscape. The cockpit dashboard displays flight data on orange screens while rugged mountains pass below. A notification banner appears at the top of the screen indicating a journal entry update.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude flight over mountainous terrain

agents.ego_description: continuing straight flight while approaching the point where hands become visible on controls

entered.detail: text banner reading Journal Entry Updated: Community Final Alert with control instructions

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft maintains steady flight over the mountainous terrain. The notification banner remains visible at the top of the screen as the craft continues through the greenish haze.

events.description: pilot hands become visible gripping the flight controls

agents.ego_description: executing a left bank turn with hands visible on controls, tilting the spacecraft to survey the terrain

entered.detail: gloved hands of the pilot gripping the flight controls

segments.scene_description: The pilot's hands appear on the flight controls as the spacecraft begins a pronounced left bank turn. The planetary surface shifts from the center to the right side of the view as the craft tilts, revealing more of the rugged terrain below through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude flight over mountainous terrain

events.description: spacecraft levels out from the banking turn

agents.ego_description: continuing flight over the hazy terrain after completing the turn

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft levels out from the turn and resumes straight flight. The pilot's hands move away from the controls and exit the frame. The planetary surface returns to the center of the view as the craft continues its journey over the misty, mountainous landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit as it navigates a steady path over an alien world before executing a sharp banking maneuver. It begins with a straight flight over a hazy, greenish landscape of rugged mountains, while orange flight data screens and a journal notification banner occupy the dashboard. As the craft maintains its course through the mist, the pilot's hands enter the frame to grip the controls, initiating a pronounced left bank turn that shifts the planetary surface toward the right side of the view. The scene then transitions as the spacecraft levels out from the tilt, returning the mountainous terrain to the center of the frame. Finally, the pilot's hands move away from the controls and exit the view as the craft resumes its steady journey through the atmospheric haze.
